original:
"Yes, I- That's not-"

He exhales sharply. "Not only is theft a sin. I did also swear a sacred oath that I would never steal again."

option_line: BFFI_meetMenesBornOptSteal3:"Then I'll steal it. You can just show up and be yourself."
original: Then I'll steal it. You can just show up and be yourself.
"But I, I-" he stutters to a halt. "I suppose, in the strictest sense this is... captain, I do not like it. Is there no alternative?"

option_line: BFFI_meetMenesBornOptSteal4a:"No one gets hurt. And it's a fake which they stole from your people in the first place."
original: No one gets hurt. And it's a fake which they stole from your people in the first place.

option_line: BFFI_meetMenesBornOptSteal4c:"I could threaten to bombard the planet until Menes surrenders the relic."
original: I could threaten to bombard the planet until Menes surrenders the relic.
Bornanew gives you a distraught look.

Bornanew gives you a distraught look.

"I pray that is merely a joke in poor taste."

Your tactical officer has already spearheaded an effort to discreetly collect what public information is available on Menes Yaribay's compound. Sensors has arranged passive scans to correlate with on-record plans of the structure. Comms found a PR puff-piece holo in which Menes gives a personal tour of part of his 'collection'.  

All you really need to do is get yourself invited into the inner sanctum.

option_line: bffi_mmBornDoSteal:"Then it's decided. I'll have tools, it'll be fine."
